content.title: contact
content.subtitle: Let's work together
content.description: I'm always interested in hearing about new opportunities and exciting projects. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!

orderOfService.title: order of service
orderOfService.description: Available for freelance projects, full-time opportunities, and consulting work. Let's discuss how we can work together to bring your ideas to life.
